title: The Long Night: The Creation of the White Walkers #got #shorts
description: The White Walkers were not always monsters—they were created. This is the dark origin of the Others and the mistake that changed the world forever. #ASOIAF #WhiteWalkers #Shorts

scenes.narration: The White Walkers were not born in darkness—they were created by those trying to survive it.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient ritual site deep in forest under dark sky, eerie atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As the war with the First Men grew worse, the Children of the Forest searched for a way to end it.
scenes.image_prompt: Children of the Forest watching destruction from hidden forest, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They turned to ancient magic—older than memory, and far more dangerous than they understood.
scenes.image_prompt: glowing runes and symbols forming in dark ritual space, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A human was taken, bound to the roots of a weirwood tree.
scenes.image_prompt: human figure tied to weirwood roots surrounded by ritual circle, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A blade of dragonglass was driven into his heart, channeling the magic into his body.
scenes.image_prompt: obsidian dagger glowing as it pierces chest, intense ritual moment, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In that moment, something changed—the first of the Others was born.
scenes.image_prompt: transformation into icy being with glowing blue eyes, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What was meant to be a weapon became something far more powerful—and impossible to control.
scenes.image_prompt: newly formed White Walker standing in silence with cold aura spreading, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Children realized too late that they had created a force that did not obey them.
scenes.image_prompt: Children retreating in fear as icy presence expands, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The war did not end—it evolved into something far more dangerous.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walkers beginning to gather in frozen landscape, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because in trying to end one war, they created a threat that would haunt the world forever.
scenes.image_prompt: endless icy army forming under dark sky, ominous cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
